allow: Bash(python -c "from src.agents.difficulty_presets import get_preset, PRESETS, DifficultyPreset; p = get_preset\('casual'\); print\(f'casual: {p.name}, temp={p.temperature}, overrides={p.persona_overrides}'\); p2 = get_preset\('standard'\); print\(f'standard: {p2.name}, temp={p2.temperature}, overrides={p2.persona_overrides}'\); p3 = get_preset\('master'\); print\(f'master: {p3.name}, temp={p3.temperature}, overrides={p3.persona_overrides}'\); p4 = get_preset\('chaos'\); print\(f'chaos: {p4.name}, temp={p4.temperature}, overrides={p4.persona_overrides}'\); p5 = get_preset\('unknown'\); print\(f'unknown -> defaults to: {p5.name}'\)")
